modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error on laundry reader device in Kiosoft Washboard App

full_description_text:  
User sees an error on the laundry reader.  
This happens in the Kiosoft Washboard App.  
They are unsure what to do next.  
Help is needed to fix this issue.
